title: My Stepdaughter Forged A Lease, Evicted Me, And Stole $75K. So I Watched Her Go Bankrupt.
description: After my husband died, his daughter forged a lease to evict me and stole a $75,000 insurance payout. What she didn't know was I had secretly purchased the entire building years before. Two years later I evicted her bakery, sent a back-rent bill that forced her into bankruptcy, and reopened my own café across the street. #ProRevenge #FamilyBetrayal #Karma
thumb_text: SHE FORGED A LEASE AND EVICTED ME. I BANKRUPTED HER.

thumb_lines.text: I HAD SECRETLY PURCHASED THE ENTIRE BUILDING YEARS BEFORE
